about.title: The leading firm
about.p1: Sirius Teranga Consulting (STC) is the specialized Asset Management & EAM consulting firm in Senegal. We support organizations in transforming their critical asset management through our strategic alliance with Talan and Hexagon.
about.p2: Our team brings over 40 years of experience in the most demanding industrial environments — Toyota, Fives ECL, RATP, Veolia — deploying this expertise for Senegalese and West African companies.
about.highlight1_desc: Sole certified entry point for Octave Attune EAM in Senegal.
about.highlight2_desc: Decades of experience in heavy industry, transport and facility management.
about.desc: STC goes beyond EAM solution integration. From strategic diagnosis to operational implementation, we deliver transformed organizations.

mission.title: Mission · Vision ·
mission.subtitle: The foundations that guide each of our interventions.
mission.mission_text: Transform critical asset management for Senegalese and West African companies into lasting competitive advantage, through operational excellence and the best global EAM solutions.
mission.vision_text: Become the reference partner for digital Asset Management in West Africa, recognized for deployment quality and result sustainability.

partnership.tag: Our Alliance — The Foundation of our Authority
partnership.title: Octave Attune EAM in Senegal:
partnership.intro: In the world of digital Asset Management, not all solutions are equal — and neither are all integrators. Octave Attune EAM (formerly HxGN EAM), developed by Hexagon, is recognized by global analysts as the reference platform for industrial asset lifecycle management.
partnership.intro2: In Senegal, that partner is SIRIUS TERANGA CONSULTING.
partnership.chain_talan_desc: French leader in Octave Attune EAM integration
partnership.chain_stc_desc: Official partner in Senegal & West Africa
partnership.chain_guarantee: This chain guarantees: official Hexagon certifications on every deployment, direct escalation to the publisher when needed, a maintained and sustainable product roadmap, and the peace of mind that your investment will never become orphaned.
partnership.compare_title: What this partnership changes for you

compare.avec: Hexagon-certified deployment, Audit to Success™ methodology

compare.sans: Risk of project drift, cost overrun, delays
compare.avec: Controlled planning, contractual milestones, respected budget

compare.sans: Limited support, difficult escalation to publisher
compare.avec: Direct escalation to Hexagon via our French partner
Validated business configuration, training, skills transfer
Planned updates, sustainability guaranteed by global publisher

expertises.tag: Beyond systems: structuring the organization and executing transformation
expertises.title: The tool without the method
expertises.intro: Deploying an EAM like Octave Attune is a necessary but not sufficient condition for transforming your asset performance. What makes the difference between a project that lasts and a deployment that runs out of steam after 6 months is the quality of the organization, processes and management that surround it.
expertises.intro2: SIRIUS TERANGA CONSULTING operates across this entire chain. We don't deliver configured software. We deliver transformed organizations.

domains.title: Process optimization & operational excellence
domains.objective: Improve overall performance by eliminating inefficiencies and structuring key processes.

domains.title: Organizational audit & structuring
domains.objective: Align the organization with its operational and strategic challenges.

domains.title: Resource provision & operational management
domains.objective: Secure project execution and guarantee results achievement.

expertises.integrated_title: An integrated approach: Organization × Processes × Systems
expertises.integrated_desc: Our three intervention domains are not isolated services. They form a coherent system, designed to align what your organization does (processes), how it is structured (organization), and with what tools it operates (information systems). This alignment — and it alone — guarantees lasting operational performance.
expertises.positioning: SIRIUS TERANGA CONSULTING goes beyond EAM solution integration.
expertises.positioning_flow: Strategic Diagnostic → Operational Implementation → Performance Management
expertises.cta_title: Is your organization aligned to perform?
expertises.cta_desc: Request an Organizational & Process Diagnostic — natural complement to the EAM Diagnostic

references.tag: What our teams built — before building STC
references.title: Our track record doesn't start
references.intro: Organizations don't trust firms — they trust experts. STC consultants have spent decades solving exactly the problems you face today: maintaining critical fleets, structuring complex real estate portfolios, industrializing maintenance processes, deploying infrastructure in Africa.
references.sectors_subtitle: What we did, not just where we were.

Network asset maintenance, planned shutdowns, regulatory traceability, lifecycle costs
Tower/antenna construction and monitoring, network asset management in Africa, passive infrastructure maintenance
Heavy site equipment, maintenance in difficult field conditions, multi-project sites

references.micro_case: Maintenance of a railway fleet serving 5M passengers/day — structuring preventive plans, reducing failure rate by 23%.
references.cta_title: These references are your next solution.
references.cta_desc: Ask to see how we transpose this expertise to your context

diagnostic.tag: Exclusive Offer — STC Digital Maturity Diagnostic
diagnostic.title: In 2 days, know exactly where you stand.
diagnostic.title_accent: And where you need to go.
diagnostic.intro: Most Senegalese and West African organizations manage their assets with inadequate tools — spreadsheets, obsolete systems, or complete absence of CMMS. They know something must change, but they don't know where to start, how much it costs, or how much it returns.
diagnostic.intro2: The STC Digital Maturity Diagnostic answers these three questions in 2 days. No jargon. With numbers.
diagnostic.day1_desc: Our senior consultants analyze your current maintenance processes, interview your operational teams, inspect your asset portfolio and evaluate your existing information system.
diagnostic.day2_desc: Presentation of the Digital Maturity Report with ISO 55001 scale scoring, identification of 3 priority quick-ROI projects, 12-36 month transformation roadmap proposal, projected investment and expected gains costing.
diagnostic.deliverable: Deliverable: A 20-30 page document, immediately usable for strategic decision-making or funding submission.
criteria: You manage a critical asset portfolio (transport, buildings, industry) valued > 500M FCFA.
You have difficulties anticipating breakdowns and maintenance costs.
You respond to public tenders where digital maturity is an evaluation criterion.
You are in a growth phase and want to industrialize your processes before scaling.
sectors: Transport & Mobility — BRT operators, TER, airports, ports
Facility Management — Property managers, hospitality, healthcare
Mining & Resources — Mining sites, quarries, extractives
Industry & Energy — Cement plants, agro-industry, utilities
diagnostic.cta_desc: Free for qualified tenders. Confidential. No commitment.
diagnostic.cta_sub: Response within 24h. Diagnostic completed within 2 weeks. Confidential.
diagnostic.badge: Official Octave Attune EAM Partner — Talan — Hexagon Certified
